prompt: A sleek Chinese social-media style screenshot on a dark charcoal black interface, minimalist and premium, with a large rounded rectangular image card placed in the lower left-center and a small rounded chat bubble in the upper right. The overall canvas is mostly empty dark space, giving a clean tech presentation feel. At the top left of the main area, show one line of bold white Chinese text reading: “换成小米汽车，我做一张更像发布会级别的整车爆炸分解图。” In the upper right, include a single gray rounded speech bubble with white Chinese text: “小米汽车的产品拆解图”. Below, display one featured poster-like infographic card with rounded corners and a glossy black background. Inside that card, create a highly polished exploded-view automotive product presentation for a turquoise Xiaomi SU7 electric sedan, shown in dramatic three-quarter front view, with the car body separated into many components suspended around the chassis. The hood is open, trunk lid lifted, four side doors detached and floating outward, front bumper and fascia separated, headlights isolated, interior exposed, and major mechanical and structural modules arranged neatly in layers beneath and around the body. The visual style should resemble a premium launch-event keynote slide: cinematic studio lighting, realistic reflections, sharp detail, dark background, subtle blue highlights, and precise technical composition. In the upper left of the infographic card, place large white Chinese title text in three lines: “小米汽车 SU7”, “产品拆解图”, “科技跨越，人车合一”. Add an orange square Xiaomi-style logo in the upper right corner of the card. Surround the car with 14 Chinese callout labels connected by thin white leader lines, identifying visible parts and systems. On the left side, include 6 labels for features such as integrated closed front fascia, LED headlights, front trunk design, high-voltage battery, front motor assembly, front double-wishbone suspension, and Brembo four-piston brake caliper. On the right side, include 8 labels for features such as electric tailgate, through-type taillight, frameless doors, hidden door handles, rear motor assembly, rear motor specs, all-aluminum alloy chassis, five-link rear suspension, and Michelin performance tires. Beneath the exploded car body, clearly show the battery pack, front and rear drive units, suspension subframes, wheel assemblies, braking components, front and rear seats, center console parts, underbody panels, and structural floor elements, all separated and floating in a carefully organized exploded arrangement. At the bottom of the infographic card, add a horizontal information strip divided into 5 columns of small Chinese specification text with headings for vehicle dimensions, power performance, range, intelligent driving, and safety structure. In the lower left of the card, place a bold white Chinese label “编辑”. In the lower center, include a circular down-arrow icon, and in the lower right, a share/export icon. The composition should look like a real screenshot from a Chinese AI chat app showcasing an automatically generated high-end car teardown infographic, with modern UI spacing, crisp typography, and a luxurious black-and-cyan color palette.
